category_sources: source_facts.description says it plays Wordle in the command line; official git.hanabi.in README describes wordle-cli as a Go implementation of Wordle in CLI.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is wordle; source_facts.homepage points to the official wordle-cli project.
docs_sources: Official git.hanabi.in project exposes README as the primary documentation surface; no separate docs site found.
repo_sources: source_facts.source-archive is https://git.hanabi.in/repos/wordle-cli.git; official git.hanabi.in project page gives the same clone URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify a command-line Wordle game; official README describes a Go CLI implementation.
